title: lippia ganevii
intro: Lippia ganevii, also known as Mexican oregano, is a perennial shrub native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lippia ganevii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Lippia ganevii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
